causalAutopsy.notes: A session stalled silently for ~1h. The ActiveWorkSilenceSentinel detected + escalated correctly, but its design only ever had detect+nudge+ask — no recover step — and its escalations went to the consolidated lifeline topic (which was deleted), so the operator saw silence and the only remedy offered was 'want me to dig in?', putting recovery back on the human. The latent gap: no auto-recover rung and no per-session notice routing. This change adds both (recover dark-by-default; routing on by default).
